symbols: waterlilies — purity and spiritual emergence from murky depths
still water — peace, reflection, and divine calm
lily pads — sustaining surface above hidden depths
budding flowers — nascent life and potential
dark water — the deep, the unknown, the primordial
description: A naturalistic painting of waterlilies on a dark pond. Two fully opened pink-and-white blossoms float among broad, dark green lily pads. Several unopened buds rise on slender stems above the water's surface. The flowers are rendered with delicate pink petals and bright yellow centers. The surrounding water is deep and dark, creating a strong contrast with the luminous petals. The composition is viewed from slightly above, looking down onto the pond surface.
